title: れっつごー開運ツアー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my day off, I decide to take a walk around the academy.
Suddenly—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hrng?! You there! Halt! You have a peculiar air about you!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Could it be? You're destined to stroll with me this afternoon! Thanken
you, thanken you!
choice_data_list: Actually, there's this, uh... thing I need to do.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! Wait a second! Could you at least listen to what I have to
say?! It'll only take a moment!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I have the day off today—no training or classes—so I was thinking
about heading to town to kick back and relax.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The thing is... during my usual morning milk divination, it said my luck
today would be horrendous!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But I didn't want to waste my precious day off, so I came up with a
plan!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
To gather up all my luckiest items and stuff them into my
pockets—every last one of them!
choice_data_list: And where do I come into play?
And where do I come into play?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The divination also said that spending time with those who care for
you will improve your luck! So please! Could you pleeease come with
me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru persistently bugs me to accompany her, and after
finally giving in to her request, we make our way into town.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
First, we're stopping by the candy shop! We can test your fortune
here!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Get a piece of candy that comes with a chance to win a prize! That'll
tell you if you're lucky or not!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I buy a piece of gum, and upon unwrapping it—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whoaaa! You won! That means your luck today is fantastic!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm next! I've got all these charms on me, so surely I'll be able
to undo the misfortune from today's morning milk divination!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru steels herself, then carefully unwraps her own
piece of gum.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing written on mine, which means I'm neither lucky nor
unlucky—so normal luck!
choice_data_list: But you got nothing. Isn't that bad luck?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Get with the times! It's better this way! Anyway, hurry up! Let's go to
the next place!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The general store—my favorite place to look for lucky items! C'mon,
let's get searching!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! I already found something! These are super rare daruma dolls!
Look, they all have both of their eyes drawn on!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
They're usually drawn on when a wish has come true, so these ones
have already completed their mission!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'll take three, please—one to use, one to save, and one to give away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We enjoy the rest of our walk going from store to store. Then...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No better way to wrap things up than with a grateful prayer to the
heavens! Thank you for another misfortune-free day!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Fortune-telling... Divinations... They really are the best. They're
always there to motivate me—push me forward, y'know? Well, at least
ever since then...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh! I started believing in divinations when I was little! I loved
running so much, but...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well... I was really bad at it. At my school sports events, I'd always
want to be class runner, but I didn't have the courage to speak
up—not until I had that dream.

text_block_list.name: Shiraoki
text_block_list.text:
Fukukitaru... Heed my words, Fukukitaru... You are to run in your
school race. You will run, and you will win.

text_block_list.name: Young Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh? Really? But who are you?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's how I first met the great Shiraoki! I followed her instructions,
running in the race—and lo and behold, I won!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ever since then, before I start running, I do some kind of divination or
wish upon one of my lucky items!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
To me, all those things are a trail that leads me to good fortune.
They're my road to victory!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If it weren't for them, I'd never even make it past the starting gate...
I'd be nothing without them.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's why I can't give them up—not my lucky items, not my
divinations. I don't want to go back to being nothing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt that Matikanefukukitaru truly values her divinations
and lucky items. They're important to her because they keep her
going.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reliance is fine up to a point, but it's dangerous to become
completely dependent. I need to do something about this and help
her before it's too late.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh? What are we trying?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hm... So you want me to try out this claw machine, is that right?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Say no more! Witness the power of my lucky items!
choice_data_list:
I'd like you to remove them from your pockets
first.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Do you hear yourself?! It's impossible for me to win without
them!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I have horrendous luck today! Maybe the claw machine will
break down as soon as I put my money in! That's how bad my luck is!
choice_data_list: Then we'll call over one of the attendants.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I don't know... You aren't being very reasonable right now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm somehow able to convince Matikanefukukitaru to listen to my
advice and temporarily confiscate her lucky items.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Urk... Now I'm just a walking lump of misfortune...
choice_data_list: All right, let's give it a go.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I'm getting a single prize... Not with my current luck.
I'm useless... A sorry, hopeless blob...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's worth a shot... At least my lucky trainer is standing by my
side... You'll do that for me, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her pleas, I take a step back and create distance between us.
Now alone and itemless, she attempts the game.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
See? Nothing. But what else would happen? It's not like I have my
lucky items to help me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh? I'm allowed to try again? Well, okay then... If you say so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Matikanefukukitaru plays round after round, until finally—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flop!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wait... I won?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I did it! I won a prize!
choice_data_list: And all without your lucky items.
And all without your lucky items.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... So what you're saying is... If I don't have my lucky items with
me, all I need to do is make my own luck!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Phew... I feel like a huge weight has been lifted—literally. It's good knowing I don't have to carry all that stuff around with me anymore.
choice_data_list:
Overreliance on your stuff hurts more than it
helps.

Overreliance on your stuff hurts more than it
helps.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yep, I get it now! You're right. I was being too scared for my own
good. I'll try to cut down on my lucky items.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But wow... Today sure was a super lucky day after all! This is the start
of a new chapter for me—I know it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This prize that I so painstakingly won will serve to commemorate this
wonderful occasion! It will be my newest lucky item!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Or well... I guess I shouldn't add even more to my collection. Ehehe...
I'll just give this to one of the good kids in the neighborhood or
something.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'll just have to make do with the stuff I've already got! As long as
you're with me, that's more than enough for me! It wouldn't hurt to do
a bit of decluttering after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a smile on her face, she gives a satisfied nod. Hopefully, this
change of heart is a step in the right direction.
